name: Get: Sign in: Library card: Check of less than minimum allowed or more than maximum characters
fullName: Book detail view screen: Get: Sign in: Library card: Check of less than minimum allowed or more than maximum characters

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search for "As the Crows Fly" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  Sing in screen is opened
When  Enter a Library card with 15 numbers and save it as 'libraryCard' on Sign in screen
And  Enter a valid Password for "LYRASIS Reads" library on Sign in screen
And  Tap the Sign in button on Sign in screen
Then  There is an alert "Invalid credentials" on Sign in screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Get: Sign in: Library card: Check of less than minimum allowed or more than maximum characters
